Package de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule

Class SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.Triple<Term,Term,Term>
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.mergerule.SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt
public class SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt extends Triple<Term,Term,Term>
A symbolic execution state with program counter is a triple of a symbolic state in form of a parallel update, a path condition in form of a JavaDL formula, and a program counter in form of a JavaDL formula with non-empty Java Block (and a possible post condition as first, and only, sub term).

  • Constructor Details

    • SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

      public SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt(Term symbolicState, Term pathCondition, Term programCounter)
      Parameters:
      symbolicState - The symbolic state (parallel update).
      pathCondition - The path condition (formula).
      programCounter - The program counter: Formula with non-empty Java block and post condition as only sub term.

    • SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt

      public SymbolicExecutionStateWithProgCnt(Term symbolicState, Term pathCondition, Term programCounter, Node correspondingNode)
      Parameters:
      symbolicState - The symbolic state (parallel update).
      pathCondition - The path condition (formula).
      programCounter - The program counter: Formula with non-empty Java block and post condition as only sub term.
      correspondingNode - The node corresponding to this SE state.

      Returns:

      public void setCorrespondingNode(Node correspondingNode)
      Parameters:

    • toSymbolicExecutionState

      public SymbolicExecutionState toSymbolicExecutionState()
